name: neonpulsesearchbar
title: Neon Pulse Search Bar
description: A "God-Tier" Atmospheric Search Bar. Features: - Rotating Multi-Color Border Beam: Continuous magenta-purple racing light. - Constant Atmospheric Underglow: Perpetual breathing ambient light behind the input. - Typing-Reactive Pulse: Glow intensifies and speeds up as the user types. - Command Center Logic: Supports Cmd/Ctrl + K auto-focus within a glassmorphic container.
